top_signals.title: Maybank Handles $4.9 Billion Deals for Singapore, Malaysia Hub
top_signals.summary: Malayan Banking Bhd said the Johor-Singapore special economic zone will drive further expansion, with Malaysia’s biggest lender having facilitated about 20 billion ringgit ($4.9 billion) in financing and investments in the area in the past couple of years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: How SpaceX President Gwynne Shotwell has achieved Musk’s lofty ambitions
top_signals.summary: The company's president has spent 24 years focused on building and selling SpaceX through her engineering expertise and dealmaking ​instincts.

top_signals.title: South Korean president mentions need for acquisition pact with Japan
top_signals.summary: In 2012, the Japanese and South Korean governments were close to concluding an ACSA, but strong criticism in South Korea stalled momentum for a deal.
